prompt: Make the blueprint more clear and remove unnecessary details. Maintain the overall structure and style of the blueprint.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, an architectural blueprint, to enhance its clarity and legibility. Improve the sharpness and contrast of all lines, while removing any faint background smudges, extraneous marks, or minor, non-essential annotations that contribute to visual clutter. The distinctive black-and-white line-art style and the precise architectural structure of the building section must be fully preserved without alteration.
objects: Faint background smudges (should not be present)
Minor, non-essential annotations contributing to visual clutter (should not be present)
